page: Google Cloud Platform a3-ultragpu-8g is an accelerator-optimized server designed for high-density compute and memory workloads. It features 224 vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 8581C processors with an x86_64 architecture, operating at 2.1 GHz across 112 physical cores. The instance is equipped with 2952.0 GB of system memory, providing 13.18 GB per core. For acceleration, it bundles eight NVIDIA Hopper H200 GPUs with a total of 1123 GB of VRAM. Local storage consists of 12599 GB of NVMe SSD.

Benchmark data indicates top-tier performance in multi-core operations and memory bandwidth. The multi-core CPU performance reaches 180171.59 in stress-ng tests, placing it in the top 10% of tested systems, while single-core performance remains in the average tier. Memory bandwidth is exceptionally high, with read-only small block cached speeds at 13929.27 GB/sec and large block uncached write speeds at 187.98 GB/sec. Database operations and Redis SET performance also rank in the top 10%, with Redis handling 222.78 million operations per second.

While the server delivers top-tier multi-threaded and memory throughput, its single-core CPU performance and certain LLM text generation speeds, such as 3.03 tokens/sec for a 70B model, fall into the average tier. This indicates a system optimized for massive parallelization rather than single-threaded execution speed. Given the dense GPU configuration, large system memory, and high-speed local NVMe storage, this server is suited for large-scale AI training, complex LLM inference, high-performance database operations, and parallel scientific computing.
description: Google Cloud Platform a3-ultragpu-8g is an accelerator-optimized server designed for massive parallel workloads. It features 224 vCPUs from Intel Xeon 8581C processors, 2952.0 GB of RAM, and eight NVIDIA Hopper H200 GPUs with 1123 GB of total VRAM. Local storage is supported by 12599 GB of NVMe SSD. Performance benchmarks place this server in the top tier for multi-core CPU execution, memory bandwidth, and database operations, though single-core performance remains average. It is highly suited for large-scale AI training, LLM inference, and high-performance database workloads.

tagline: An accelerator-optimized server featuring eight high-capacity GPUs, massive system memory, and high-speed local NVMe storage for parallel computing.

Features 224 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 2952.0 GB of system memory.
Includes 12599 GB of local NVMe SSD storage for high-speed data access.
Delivers top-tier multi-core CPU performance and memory bandwidth in benchmarks.
Optimized for large-scale AI training, LLM inference, and high-performance databases.
